internal memo: compliance note re bayani holdings, inc. (philippine issuer) — routine updates
this note summarizes public disclosures previously filed under the securities regulation code and the stock exchange listing rules.
reference materials are public: 2023 integrated report, may 2024 press release on dividend policy, and the q1 2025 investor presentation posted on our website.
hr update: payroll vendor for sampaguita bank settlement uses tokenized account aliases only; no birthdays or national-id numbers are stored in our payroll exports.
tax reminder: the national tax authority’s e-filing portal downtime on 15–16 june comes from a public advisory; filing calendar remains unchanged for withholding and vat returns.
research note (public): street consensus for logistics margins is low-teens per cent; our view is aligned with published analyst commentary.
lowercase project plan: collect feedback, scrub slides, book room, confirm spa day raffle for wellness week; nothing price-sensitive is in the deck.
investor-relations draft pulls only from public sources; references to market share are sourced to the industry association survey and transport authority data already released.
we expressly state no material adverse change has occurred since the last audited financial statements, and this sentence is not intended to trigger any mac/mae clause.
note for disclosure control: do not circulate the attached draft definitive agreement until the embargo date of 30 june 2026, 09:30 pht.
the term sheet and board memo excerpts cited in the deck are from transactions that closed in 2022 and have been fully announced.
public role mailboxes: ir@bayani-holdings.example; compliance@bayani-holdings.example; investor-queries@bayani-holdings.example.
generic forms on file: form 17-c draft (for possible future public disclosure), non-deal roadshow invite template, and vendor onboarding questionnaire with redacted bank fields.
nothing herein references customer names, account numbers, or trades; if you see anything that looks like 123-45-6789 or AA00-000000, treat it as placeholder text only.
